hits.title: Tearing Down Xero and QuickBooks Online's Pricing (Case Study – 16k Data Points)
Oh how I hate Intuit – Awful behavior from QuickBooks Online
Quickbooks Online down for hours, anyone know of a decent alternative?
Intuit to process Bitcoin payments with QuickBooks Online
Intuit acquires Lettuce Apps for $30M, plans to integrate it Quickbooks online
No payroll for 2 days? QuickBooks Intuit Online down again.

analysis.name: QuickBooks Online
analysis.tagline: Smart accounting software for small business
analysis.value_proposition: Cloud-based accounting platform that tracks income, expenses, invoicing, payroll, and taxes for small businesses.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small business owners, self-employed contractors, and their accountants/bookkeepers

features.name: invoicing
features.description: Create and send customizable invoices to customers

features.name: expense tracking
features.description: Track and categorize business expenses
features.evidence_quote: expense tracking is core QBO functionality

features.name: bank reconciliation
features.description: Connect bank accounts and reconcile transactions

features.name: bank feeds
features.description: Automatic import of bank and credit card transactions

features.name: payroll
features.description: Run payroll, calculate taxes, and pay employees

features.name: payroll tax filing
features.description: Automated payroll tax calculations and filings

features.name: paypal integration
features.description: Import PayPal transactions into QuickBooks

features.name: bitcoin payments
features.description: Accept and process Bitcoin payments
features.evidence_quote: Intuit to process Bitcoin payments with QuickBooks Online

features.name: chart of accounts
features.description: Customizable chart of accounts for business bookkeeping

features.name: financial reporting
features.description: P&L, balance sheet, cash flow, and custom reports

features.name: sales tax tracking
features.description: Automatic sales tax calculation and tracking

features.name: 1099 contractor management
features.description: Track and file 1099s for contractors

features.name: inventory tracking
features.description: Track inventory quantities and cost of goods sold
features.evidence_quote: inventory in Plus tier and above

features.name: project profitability
features.description: Track income and expenses by project

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Track billable hours for employees and contractors

features.name: multi-currency
features.description: Handle transactions in multiple currencies

features.name: receipt capture
features.description: Snap photos of receipts and auto-match to transactions

features.name: mileage tracking
features.description: Auto-track vehicle mileage via mobile app

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS and Android apps for on-the-go accounting

features.name: accountant access
features.description: Invite accountant/bookkeeper with dedicated access

features.name: recurring invoices
features.description: Set up automated recurring invoices

features.name: quotes and estimates
features.description: Create estimates and convert to invoices

features.name: purchase orders
features.description: Create and track purchase orders

features.name: bill pay
features.description: Pay bills and vendors directly from QuickBooks

features.name: class and location tracking
features.description: Track income/expenses by class or location

features.name: budgeting
features.description: Create and track budgets against actuals

features.name: custom user permissions
features.description: Role-based access control for team members

features.name: batch invoicing
features.description: Send invoices to multiple customers at once

features.name: workflow automation
features.description: Automate recurring workflows and reminders

features.name: dedicated account manager
features.description: Priority support with dedicated rep

features.name: api access
features.description: Developer API for custom integrations

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: 750+ third-party app integrations

features.name: cash flow forecasting
features.description: Predict future cash flow

features.name: tax deduction tracking
features.description: Categorize and track deductible expenses

differentiators: Largest SMB accounting platform in the US
Deep ecosystem of accountants trained on QBO

recent_ships.what: Acquired Lettuce Apps for $30M for QBO integration
recent_ships.source: Intuit acquires Lettuce Apps for $30M, plans to integrate it Quickbooks online
Intuit to process Bitcoin payments with QuickBooks Online

praised: Ecosystem breadth — most accountants know it
complaints: Frequent outages — 'Quickbooks Online down for hours'
Payroll reliability issues — 'No payroll for 2 days'
Aggressive pricing/upsell behavior — 'Oh how I hate Intuit – Awful behavior'
Pricing complexity and frequent hikes — 'Tearing Down Xero and QuickBooks Online's Pricing'

tiers.name: Simple Start
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 user, income/expense tracking, invoicing, basic reports

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3 users, bill management, multi-currency, time tracking

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 users, inventory, project profitability, class/location tracking

tiers.name: Advanced
tiers.headline_inclusions: 25 users, workflow automation, custom roles, dedicated support

pricing.notes: Seat-limited flat monthly pricing per tier. Frequent promotional discounts (often 50% off first 3 months). Payroll is a separate add-on ($50-130/mo + per-employee). No true free tier — 30-day trial only.
